name: 14th Lowland
excerpt: An infantry regiment from which Dellan Moor and Sable Voss deserted.
notes: The 14th Lowland is a provincial infantry regiment where Dellan Moor served for four years and Sable Voss worked as a supply administrator. The regiment was primarily used for labor and construction during Dellan's service. Dellan and Sable deserted the regiment fourteen months ago.
